pre_game.message: Hi J, I'm C. It’s a bit of a strange setting to meet new people, but I’m trying to stay positive—how are you holding up with the game about to start?
Nice to meet you, C. I’m doing alright, just really focused right now. I’ve got a specific goal in mind for the prize money, so I’m pretty determined to win. How about you—feeling ready?
I’m definitely ready! I’ve got a dream trip to Japan on my vision board and some family I want to help out, so I’m just as motivated as you are. What’s the big goal you’re working toward?
I’ve got my heart set on a specific car that costs $45,000—it’s the first thing I’d buy if I hit it big. Beyond that, I just want to take care of the people I love. Japan sounds like an amazing goal!
A $45,000 car sounds like a dream! I totally get wanting to take care of family too—that’s the most important part for me as well.
Exactly. It's what keeps me motivated. Hopefully, this game gives us both a chance to make those things happen.
I agree. It makes the competition feel a bit more personal when you know what's at stake. Fingers crossed for both of us.
Definitely. Having a clear goal makes all the difference. Good luck, C!
Thanks, J! Good luck to you too—I'm really looking forward to seeing how this all plays out.
Me too. Let's see how it goes!
Definitely. I'll see you around once things get moving. Good luck again!

post_game.message: I noticed you took less than your fair share, which was very considerate. Unfortunately, others were not so kind, and I ended up with $0 because the pot ran out before my turn.
I'm very sorry to hear that you didn't receive anything. I tried to do my part by taking less, but it's disappointing that others weren't as mindful of those later in the turn order.
